patch.newText:
ensureTaggedLibrary("EggConfig")
ensureForceReplicate("EggConfig")
ensureTaggedLibrary("EggCarryService")
ensureTaggedLibrary("AudioConfig")
ensureForceReplicate("AudioConfig")
ensureTaggedLibrary("AudioService")
ensureForceReplicate("AudioService")
ensureTaggedLibrary("AudioClientRuntime")
ensureForceReplicate("AudioClientRuntime")
ensureTaggedLibrary("AudioServerRuntime")

local TimeRewardsService = Aether:LoadLibrary("TimeRewardsService")
local AudioService = Aether:LoadLibrary("AudioService")

patch.oldText:
(function()
	if BootstrapService then
		(BootstrapService :: any):Init()
	else
		warn('[BootstrapService] BootstrapService is nil (missing AE_Library tag or not present).')
	end
end)();
patch.newText:
if AudioService then
	(AudioService :: any):Init()
else
	warn('[Audio] AudioService is nil (missing AE_Library tag or not present).')
end

(function()
	if BootstrapService then
		(BootstrapService :: any):Init()
	else
		warn('[BootstrapService] BootstrapService is nil (missing AE_Library tag or not present).')
	end
end)();
